subject: cost saving, Bell 407 hanger
body:
Jeffrey,
Stuart Diamond owner of Four Star told Nicolas on Friday that he  signed a 4 
year lease with Port Authority for his hanger. Nicolas and  I negotiated a 
lower price to store the Bell 407 at Four Star's hanger, for  $1,100 per month 
(on a month to month basis) this includes half of the  office space inside the 
hanger for our use, I would like to make the change  July 1st. Currently 
St.Thomas jet center is charging us $2,200.00 per  month. 
We also have the option to store the S76 also if you decide to bring it to  
LSJ.
I would like your approval in case we are still in pursuit of  acquiring the 
lease.
Emad should have hanger pricing on Monday for a 90' X 60' hanger that  can 
fit in front of current office at Executjet, I will fax you  hanger drawing. We 
may have room to extend to 120 feet in length to edge of  Fire dept. building. 
is this approved?
Larry V



**************Vote for your city's best dining and nightlife. City's Best 
2008.      (http://citysbest.aol.com?ncid=aolacg00050000000102)

Jeffrey,
Stuart Diamond owner of Four Star told Nicolas on Friday that he signed a 4 year lease with Port Authority for his hanger. Nicolas and I negotiated a lower price to store the Bell 407 at Four Star's hanger, for $1,100 per month (on a month to month basis) this includes half of the office space inside the hanger for our use, I would like to make the change July 1st. Currently St.Thomas jet center is charging us $2,200.00 per month.
We also have the option to store the S76 also if you decide to bring it to LSJ.
I would like your approval in case we are still in pursuit of acquiring the lease.
Emad should have hanger pricing on Monday for a 90' X 60' hanger that can fit in front of current office at Executjet, I will fax you hanger drawing. We may have room to extend to 120 feet in length to edge of Fire dept. building.
is this approved?
Larry V
